description: Product Description Unleash Creativity with 144 Vibrant Wax Crayons Toddler Art Supplies by abeec 144 Wax Crayons Add To Basket 100 Felt Tips Add To Basket 180 Colouring Pencils Add To Basket Paint by Numbers Book Add To Basket Fold-Out Colouring Book Add To Basket A4 Plain Paper x 4 Buying Options Bumper Activity Book Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 931 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,005 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,287 3.9 out of 5 stars 10 4.8 out of 5 stars 10 4.6 out of 5 stars 508 4.6 out of 5 stars 12 Price £10.99 £ 10 . 99 £15.99 £ 15 . 99 £15.95 £ 15 . 95 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £7.95 £ 7 . 95 — £6.99 £ 6 . 99 CE / UKCA ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Age Suitability - 3+ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Toddler Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Travel Friendly ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Ideal Use Home, school, parties Home, school, parties Home, school, parties Home, travel, party bag Home, travel, party bag Home, school, travel Home, school, travel Discover the Colourful World of Wax Crayons for Toddlers and Beyond Looking for a fun, safe, and colourful way to keep kids entertained? The abeec 144 Wax Crayons Set delivers everything young artists need for creative playtime. With 24 rich colours and 6 of each shade, this large set provides plenty to share between siblings, classmates, or party guests. Each crayon glides smoothly over paper for bold, expressive lines — perfect for colouring books, art projects, and school crafts. CE and UKCA certified, they’re completely non-toxic and suitable for children aged 3 and up, offering parents peace of mind. Whether you’re stocking a classroom, preparing party bags, or simply encouraging creativity at home, this set ensures hours of colourful fun. abeec crayons make it easy to create, share, and celebrate imagination together. Ideal Usage: - Crayons for Kids Wax Crayons for Toddlers Kids Colouring Supplies School Art Supplies Colouring Crayons for Classroom Crayons for Party Bags Whether for party fun, classroom creativity, or rainy-day play, abeec 144 Wax Crayons give children the colours, confidence, and joy to bring their imagination to life. Are these crayons safe for young children? Yes, the abeec 144 Wax Crayons are CE and UKCA certified, ensuring they meet the highest safety standards for children aged 3 and above. Do the crayons break easily? The crayons are designed to stay sharper for longer, though gentle use is best for young children. Their solid wax structure offers smooth colouring and good resistance during regular play. How many colours are included in the box? There are 24 bright colours, with 6 crayons of each, giving a total of 144 crayons — ideal for sharing or group activities. Can these be used as party bag fillers? Absolutely! Many parents love using them as colourful, creative fillers for birthday party bags, classroom rewards, or holiday activity sets. Are they suitable for classroom or nursery use? Yes — their bulk quantity, variety of colours, and non-toxic formula make them perfect for schools, nurseries, and group craft sessions. abeec 144 Wax Crayons – Bright Colours for Kids’ Creative Fun Brand abeec What is it? A large boxed set of 144 wax crayons in 12 colours, perfect for children’s art and craft activities. Why do kids like crayons? Kids love crayons because they are a simple and engaging tool for creativity, self-expression, and learning. Colouring helps them develop fine motor skills, concentration, and a sense of accomplishment, while also allowing them to explore and recognize colours.
